aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic foundation for AEO with clear service offerings and contact information but lacks content depth, reviews, and keyword optimization.
quick_wins: Add customer reviews and testimonials to build trust and improve local SEO.
Optimize service pages with targeted keywords and location-specific content.
Implement a blog to provide valuable content related to HVAC services and local weather conditions.

gbp_analysis.found: The website includes the business name, address, and phone number (NAP) but lacks consistency and additional citations across the web.
gbp_analysis.summary: The NAP information is present on the website but needs verification and enhancement in local directories and platforms.
critical_issues: Inconsistent NAP information across the web.
Lack of citations in major local directories and platforms.

nap_citations.summary: The NAP information is present on the website but lacks citations in external directories and platforms.
action_items: Create and verify a Google My Business profile.
List the business in local directories such as Yelp, Bing Places, and Yellow Pages.
Ensure consistent NAP information across all platforms and directories.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and testimonials.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search users and potential customers looking for HVAC services in Georgetown, TX.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Encourage satisfied customers to leave reviews on Google and other platforms.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Publish high-quality, informative content related to HVAC services and local weather to establish the business as a local authority.
